things.name: Southend Pier
things.description: World's longest pleasure pier at 1.33 miles with its own railway into the Thames Estuary

things.name: Adventure Island
things.description: Thrilling amusement park on the seafront with rides for all ages

things.name: Beecroft Art Gallery
things.description: Outstanding collection of Victorian and 20th-century British art

things.name: Prittlewell Priory
things.description: 12th-century Cluniac priory set in Priory Park with museum

things.name: Southend Central Museum
things.description: Natural history and archaeology collections including the Southend Planetarium

things.name: Sealife Adventure
things.description: Aquarium with sharks, rays and tropical fish in the heart of the town

things.name: Cliff Lift
things.description: Funicular railway offering views over the seafront since 1912

things.name: Leigh-on-Sea Old Town
things.description: Picturesque fishing village with traditional cockle sheds and art galleries

things.name: Two Tree Island
things.description: Nature reserve and bird sanctuary in the Thames Estuary

things.name: Palace Hotel Visitor Attraction
things.description: Victorian hotel complex with heritage displays and sea views
